reference: Just because there is a bruise may not indicate anything serious. However, I advise checking his platelet count, and if it is normal, then there is nothing to worry about. I also think he should be undergoing follow-up abdominal ultrasound or gastrointestinal endoscopy once a year to monitor for any recurrence of the tumor.
text: Just because there's a bruise may not indicate anything serious. However, I advise checking his platelet count, and if it is normal, then there's nothing to worry about. I also think he should be undergoing follow-up abdominal ultrasound or gastrointestinal endoscopy once a year to monitor any recurrence of the tumor.
